objective: Reinforce the April 1 reel with a softer self-check prompt
visual_intent: same-day routing support for the April 1 reel
brand_guardrails: keep it lighter than the reel
protect Story-safe top and bottom zones
keep all three frames in one calm system
keep the CTA frame as a soft route to the feed, not a sales push
composition: frame 1 may borrow a soft accent plate from the reel opening frame
frames 2 and 3 stay design-first with controlled text spacing
keep Japanese copy short and authored by line
do not rely on auto-wrapping for key lines
reference_strategy: Use the approved busy-day Story example only for pacing and support tone, while the whitespace and body-copy anchors keep the April 1 story calmer, cleaner, and more authored by line.
variation_guardrails: do not duplicate the March 25 Story wording or exact cue
keep the set lighter than the reel and more reflective than explanatory
if the opening accent image is refreshed later, generate only the plate and keep layout in the compositor
maintain one card architecture across all three frames

text_overlay.headline_ja: その日の調子を 勢いだけで 進めていませんか。
slides_ja: その日の調子を 勢いだけで 進めていませんか。
瞬間的な強さより 毎日の土台を 見ること。
今の自分の リズムを 見てみる。

notes: April 1 same-day reinforcement Story. This should stay compositor-led. If a new support image plate is needed later, generate only that plate through Nano Banana and keep the text/layout in the design system.
